steps.title: Simplify the equation
steps.content: Divide both sides of $-2|x-7|=-8x$ by $-2$: $$|x-7|=4x.$$ Note that $|x-7|\ge 0$ forces $x\ge 0$.

steps.title: Solve and check cases
steps.content: Case $x<7$: $7-x=4x \implies x=\tfrac{7}{5}$ (valid). Case $x\ge 7$: $x-7=4x \implies x=-\tfrac{7}{3}$ (rejected). That matches choice B — B is correct.
